artPrompt: A wild-eyed ashen-robed human prophet stands mid-prophecy on an overturned crate, one arm flung skyward as a glowing six-sided die tumbles overhead haloed in cold gold, the other hand pressed to the heart in fervent conviction. The looming clock tower and smoke fill the blood-dark sky behind. The prophet rises through the wide frame, candlelit congregants below. Wide 4:3 landscape, bone white and deep black, end-times dread, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Prophet of the Final Recount
text: Prophecy (As this resolves, predict a number 1 through 6 out loud, then roll a six-sided die.) When Prophet of the Final Recount enters the battlefield, make a Prophecy. If you predicted correctly, create three 1/1 white Cleric creature tokens. If you were wrong, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and demand a recount.
flavorText: "I foresee the votes will be counted, and recounted, and recounted, until the heat death of the universe arrives to settle it."
